title: Ordinance Enacting the Supplemental Budget for the Year 2021 in the Amount of Nine Million Five Hundred Fifty-one Thousand Eighty-four Pesos and 80/100 (P 9,551,084.80) Covering Various Expendintures for General Fund Proper and Two Hundred Fifty-seven Thousand Three Hundred Sixty-six Pesos and 75/100 (P 257,366.75) for Slaughterhouse Operation.
